changelog:
### 🚀 Asset-to-Asset Money Transfer
- **Physical Asset Transfers** — Added capability to transfer funds between physical accounts (e.g. GCash to Bank Account) and virtual pots with optional transaction fees.
- **Linked Ledger Entries** — Implemented tandem transaction pairs (outflow and inflow) linked via an internal transfer ID, automatically hidden from notes in the UI.
- **Recursive Auto-Deletion** — Modifying or deleting one half of a transfer automatically triggers the deletion of the counterpart and safely reverts balances on both accounts.

### 🔧 UX Polish & Double-Submit Protection
- **Action Button Feedback** — Added visual loading spinners and disabled tap states for save/delete/update actions across all forms, preventing accidental duplicate CRUD requests on slower devices.
- **Boot Sequence Optimization** — Fixed the native startup black-to-white screen flash by setting the native Android launch theme window background to matte black (`#0E1013`).
- **Splash Screen Smoothness** — Enforced a minimum 2-second display duration for the splash screen to allow logo animations to complete gracefully instead of flickering.

### 🐛 Bug Fixes & Code Quality
- **Double-Delete Balance Glitch** — Fixed a bug where parallel delete requests on a transaction doubled the returned asset balance by validating transaction existence before applying reversal adjustments.
- **Static Analysis Cleanup** — Resolved 121 compiler warnings, deprecations (migrated `withOpacity` to `.withValues()`), and naming convention issues across the codebase to compile with a 100% clean analyzer status.
